MDCR_MC_PTA_PTB_CAPTD_SPEND_11 

MDCR_MC_PTA_PTB_CAPTD_SPEND_12 

LABEL: Medicare PTA/PTB Managed Care Capitated Payment Amount — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the monthly capitated premium payment amount for Medicare Part A and Part B. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug System (MARx) data (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CMS and Medicare Advantage (MA) plans use the MARx System to exchange data files and reports 
between the
